sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ الْمَرِيضُ إِلَى الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ لِشِرَاءِ الدَّوَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Pacijent je otišao u apoteku da kupi lijek.
sentences.translationEn: The patient went to the pharmacy to buy the medicine.

sentences.arabic: شَرَحَ الصَّيْدَلَانِيُّ كَيْفِيَّةَ اسْتِخْدَامِ الْعِلَاجِ بِشَكْلٍ صَحِيحٍ.
sentences.translation: Farmaceut je objasnio kako se pravilno koristi terapija.
sentences.translationEn: The pharmacist explained how to use the treatment correctly.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الضَّرُورِيِّ اتِّبَاعُ تَعْلِيمَاتِ الطَّبِيبِ بِدِقَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Neophodno je precizno slijediti uputstva ljekara.
sentences.translationEn: It is necessary to follow the doctor's instructions accurately.
